name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Sphynx Flicks
title: "[Feature] <short description>"

assignees: perera99-msd
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly. -->
<!-- e.g. "I find it frustrating that I can't filter movies by release year..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## User Impact

<!-- Who would benefit from this feature, and how? -->
<!-- e.g. "All users would be able to narrow search results more precisely." -->

## Mockups / Examples

<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features in other apps. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or information about the feature request. -->

---

**Before submitting, please confirm:**

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this has not already been requested
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals (movie discovery, watchlists, authentication)
- [ ] I am willing to contribute this feature if it is approved (optional)
